problem id: 494e04ae
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01111001 -> 11110001
  00101111 -> 01011111
  00011100 -> 00111000
  00000010 -> 00000100
  11100100 -> 11001111
  11010011 -> 10100000
  00110011 -> 01100111
  00011010 -> 00110100
  10100011 -> 01000011
  00010001 -> 00100010

query: 01100010
predicted answer: 11000111
